creator: info@juanmolina.eu
text:
I have tested the patch on two Lenovo laptops which have Synaptics (ThinkPad S440) and Elantech (S20-30) trackpads. I already had Synaptics support with the psm(4) driver and the patch doesn’t seem to introduce regressions.

What I have tested, both on console and X:
 - Select / Copy / Paste with tap, drag and three-finger tap.
 - Two-finger scroll.
 - Normal button operation.

Hope it helps,
Juan
